Container.Name: Thread-Network-Visualizer
Container.Overview:
Web UI for visualizing OpenThread mesh topology in real-time. Talks to an OpenThread Border Router (OTBR) REST API to crawl the network and draw a physics-based graph of routers and end devices.
Mount /config to an appdata folder - device_names.json lives there so your friendly device names persist across container updates.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Host port for the visualizer web UI

Config.Name: Config (device_names.json)
Config.Description: Appdata folder holding device_names.json. On first start the container seeds a default; edit the file and refresh the browser to apply.
